name: White Chocolate Cheesecake-1
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix the cookie crumbs and melted butter, then press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
Beat the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition. Blend in the melted white chocolate.
Pour the filling over the crust.
Bake for 35 minutes. Turn off the oven and allow it to cool completely in the turned-off oven for at least an hour. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and continue cooling. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours (best if chilled overnight). Garnish with whipped cream dollops and a sprinkling of crushed chocolate cookies.
(Note: Recipe by Janet Morrissey)
